channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Houston rallies to beat Duke 70-67 in the Final Four, will face Florida for the NCAA title
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Sorry guys, “Phi Slama Jama” is already taken. How ’bout something simple, like “Comeback Kids.” “National champs” might be a possibility, too.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Duke's push for 6th NCAA title falls apart in unlikely late collapse against Houston in Final Four
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Up by double figures in the second half at the Final Four, closing in on the chance to play for yet another national championship, Duke was right where it had worked all season to be. What happened next was unforgettable, history of the most painful kind.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Cedric Dempsey, the former NCAA president who led in time of transition and growth, dies at 92
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Cedric Dempsey, the former NCAA president who helped turn Arizona into a national power as athletic director before leading the national organization through key years of transition and growth, died Saturday in San Diego, the NCAA said. He was 92.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida's Clayton delivers again to outduel Auburn's Broome in Final Four matchup of All-Americans
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — Two All-Americans, one chance to give their their team a chance to win a national championship. Florida's NCAA Tournament continues thanks to more magic from guard Walter Clayton Jr. in the Gators' 79-73 victory Saturday night at the Final four.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Diego Luna's brace leads RSL past Galaxy, 2-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Diego Luna scored two goals as Real Salt Lake cruised past the LA Galaxy Saturday afternoon at America First Field, 2-0. Luna scored the two goals in a five-minute span of the first half and Real Salt Lake (3-4-0, 9 points) controlled the rest of the contest.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Clayton leads Florida to NCAA title game, scoring 34 points in 79-73 victory over SEC rival Auburn
item.description: Walter Clayton Jr. scored 34 points and Florida beat Southeastern Conference rival Auburn 79-73 in the Final Four on Saturday night, sending the Gators to the national championship game for the first time since their titles in 2006 and 2007.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Penguins' Crosby and Stars Dadonov have a dueling hat tricks game 16 years after Sid's with Ovechkin
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Sidney Crosby took part in another dueling hat tricks game with a Russian opponent 16 years after his memorable one in the playoffs against Alex Ovechkin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boutier outlasts Buhai in 28 holes in longest match in T-Mobile Match Play history
item.description: NORTH LAS VEGAS, Nev. (AP) — Celine Boutier outlasted Ashleigh Buhai on the 28th hole Saturday in the longest match in the five-year history of the T-Mobile Match Play, sending the Frenchwoman to quarterfinals. The previous record was 22 holes, set twice.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trinity Rodman scores early in her return from 8-month injury absence, and US women beat Brazil 2-0
item.description: Trinity Rodman scored in the fifth minute of her return from a lengthy injury absence, and the U.S. women’s national team beat Brazil 2-0 in a friendly rematch of the Paris Olympics gold-medal match.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Duke's Cooper Flagg wins Wooden Award, joining elite company as fourth freshman to receive honor
item.description: Cooper Flagg of Duke became the fourth freshman in history to win the Wooden Award, joining Kevin Durant, Anthony Davis and Zion Williamson.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carla Bernat Escuder leans on her Spanish roots to win Augusta National Women's Amateur
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — Carla Bernat Escuder wasn't worried about anyone behind her, only those who were ahead. Thanks to a flop shot she only recently mastered, birdies on all the par 5s and a nervy 4-foot par putt to finish, the Spaniard stood alone at the Augusta National Women's Amateur.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani throws second bullpen since resuming mound ramp up
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Shohei Ohtani threw a 26-pitch bullpen session Saturday before the Los Angeles Dodgers’ game against the Philadelphia Phillies, another step toward his mound return. Recovering from right elbow surgery on Sept.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY SANFILIPPO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former NBA star who went first overall says Cooper Flagg should return to Duke
item.description: Duke's Cooper Flagg will likely be the first overall pick in the next NBA Draft, but a former top selection says he should return to Duke.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aaron Judge matches Babe Ruth's home run total through first 1,000 games in Yankees' win over Pirates
item.description: The New York Yankees' Aaron Judge hit his 321st home run with the Yankees in his 1,000th game, matching Babe Ruth, who also hit 321 home runs in first 1,000 games with the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Falcons legend Julio Jones announces retirement from NFL after 13 seasons
item.description: Atlanta Falcons great Julio Jones announced his retirement from the NFL after 13 seasons. Jones is the franchise's all-time leader in receptions and receiving yards.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Real Salt Lake hosts winless champs LA Galaxy in crucial western showdown
item.description: Real Salt Lake (2-4-0, T-11th place Western Conference) returns home Saturday afternoon when they host reigning MLS Cup Champions LA Galaxy at America First Field. RSL is coming off a road loss on Saturday night and hope to get their season back on track against a struggling LA side.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Baseball Hall of Famer Fergie Jenkins believes torpedo bats could lead to higher batting averages
item.description: Baseball Hall of Famer Fergie Jenkins talked about torpedo bats and what they can do for hitters during an appearance on OutKick's "The Ricky Cobb Show.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
